## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Requested behavior is complete.
- [ ] Relevant controllers/platforms were tested.
- [ ] No private/hidden game information leaks.
- [ ] Documentation / ADR / CHANGELOG updated if needed.
- [ ] New assets include provenance/license notes.
